        message: String((err as any)?.message ?? err),

react-hooks/exhaustive-deps.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'createLinkToken'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'createLinkToken' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [createLinkToken, userId]

regexp/no-super-linear-move.message: Any attack string /\s+/ plus some rejecting suffix will cause quadratic runtime because of this quantifier.
Any attack string /.+/i plus some rejecting suffix will cause quadratic runtime because of this quantifier.

regexp/no-super-linear-backtracking.message: The quantifier '\s*' can exchange characters with '.*'. Using any string accepted by /[\t\x0b\f \xa0\u1680\u2000-\u200a\u202f\u205f\u3000\ufeff]+/i, this can be exploited to cause at least polynomial backtracking.

The quantifier '\s*' can exchange characters with '.*'. Using any string accepted by /[\t\x0b\f \xa0\u1680\u2000-\u200a\u202f\u205f\u3000\ufeff]+/i, this can be exploited to cause at least polynomial backtracking.

The quantifier '\s*' can exchange characters with '.*'. Using any string accepted by /[\t\x0b\f \xa0\u1680\u2000-\u200a\u202f\u205f\u3000\ufeff]+/i, this can be exploited to cause at least polynomial backtracking.
